verdict.answer_first: B starts with the fault immediately: "The decrement. `i--`"; A also answers early with "`i--` decrements," but B is more direct.
verdict.decisiveness: Both commit to one fix: "Change `i--` to `i++`" / "Change it to `i++`".
verdict.actionability: Tie in substance, but B is easier to scan: "Change it to `i++`:" followed by the corrected loop.
